title: Crypto-D3a -- Existing-Data Provenance Pin Attempt (provenance/memo only, no fetch)

1_crypto_d3_summary.structural_qa: CLEAN: BTC/ETH 2020-01-01..2026-05-29 (2341 rows), SOL 2020-08-11..2026-05-29 (2118 rows); 0 dup, 0 invalid OHLC, 0 zero/neg volume, 0 missing calendar days; one USDT quote
1_crypto_d3_summary.blocking_reason: provenance unpinned (source exchange, spot-vs-perp, retrieval method undocumented for these exact files)

2_evidence_searched: repo-wide grep: frozen_regime_inputs, daily aggregation/resample, btcusdt_1d, Binance/Kraken/Coinbase, spot/perp, USDT, SPARTA_RESEARCH_LAB
directory listing of data/frozen_regime_inputs/ incl. *.superseded.* backups

producer_code_path.fetcher_docstring: Fetches public SPOT daily klines for BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT from the Binance public market data endpoint; writes canonical frozen CSV under data/frozen_regime_inputs/
producer_code_path.endpoint: https://api.binance.com/api/v3/klines (Binance SPOT market data API; perps would be fapi.binance.com)
producer_code_path.url_guard: rejects account/order/trade/userdata/signed/signature/apikey/secret; no API key; no signed/account/trading endpoints
producer_code_path.utc_boundary: open_time(ms epoch) -> datetime.fromtimestamp(.., tz=utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'); Binance 1d klines anchored 00:00 UTC
producer_code_path.orchestrator: tools/regime_shadow_fresh_data_update.py (Phase 5F): crypto refresh via fetch_binance_crypto_daily_frozen.fetch_and_stage, gated --allow-network-for-crypto, CRYPTO_INTERVAL='1d', whitelist BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT, endpoint api.binance.com/api/v3/klines only

3_evidence_found.manifest_corroboration: reports/crypto_regime_data_acquisition_manifest.json: source data.binance.vision (Binance spot) -- corroborates Binance-spot lineage BUT documents a 1h acquisition into a DIFFERENT folder (SPARTA_RESEARCH_LAB\...\data\raw); supportive context, NOT the 1:1 record for these daily files

dataset_stability.superseded_pattern: *.csv.superseded.<timestamp>; end date rolls forward over time (2026-05-20, -21, -22, -26, -27, -29)
dataset_stability.implication: the 'frozen' file is LIVE daily-refreshed by the Phase 5F updater; content and end date change daily; no committed content-hashed immutable snapshot of a specific retrieval exists for these exact files

spot_vs_perp.value: SPOT (spot endpoint; perp=fapi; docstring 'public spot daily klines'; URL guard forbids account/order/trade/signed)

timeframe_origin_native_vs_aggregated.value: daily-native (ALLOWED_INTERVAL='1d', fetched directly at 1d, not 1h->1d aggregation)

2026_inclusion_and_seal.value: 2026 present (149 bars/symbol); MUST be sealed (Crypto-D1 sec10)

immutable_frozen_snapshot.value: gitignored + 72 .superseded.* backups = live daily-refreshed; end date rolls forward; no committed per-file sha256

4_provenance_fields_checklist.summary: 9 of 10 source-provenance fields PINNED; the single unmet item is dataset immutability (a dataset-stability gap, not a source-provenance gap)

5_verdict_nuance: Source provenance is now pinned (Binance public SPOT klines, api.binance.com/api/v3/klines, USDT, daily-native 1d, UTC 00:00, retrieval script identified) -- a clear upgrade from Crypto-D3's UNKNOWN; no new fetch is required to establish origin. The data is NOT ready only because the on-disk dataset is a live, daily-refreshed, gitignored copy (72 superseded backups; rolling end date), not an immutable content-hashed frozen snapshot. A validation-factory backing dataset must be frozen and hash-pinned for reproducibility.

6_if_pinned_proceed_conditions.reason: source pinned but dataset not frozen; must be frozen into the factory first

rules_once_frozen.2026_seal: drop all 2026 bars; IS=2020-2023, OOS=2024-2025 (Crypto-D1 sec10); 2026 blocked unless separately authorized
rules_once_frozen.sol_per_symbol_window: start 2020-08-11 (listing); tri-symbol joint tests align to common 2020-08-11+ index or pre-registered per-symbol windows
rules_once_frozen.quote_rule: USDT, documented, reconciled vs USD/USDC (no silent mixing)

7_if_not_pinned_recommendation.primary_recommended: Factory-internal FREEZE (no fetch): snapshot the current data/frozen_regime_inputs BTC/ETH/SOL 1d CSVs into the factory data area under a frozen naming convention; SEAL OUT 2026 at freeze time (keep <= 2025-12-31); write a per-file provenance sidecar (source=Binance spot api/v3/klines, USDT, 1d-native, UTC, retrieval script + snapshot date, sha256 per file); commit the immutable snapshot + sidecar for reproducibility.
7_if_not_pinned_recommendation.alternative: Crypto-D3b re-provision with its own explicit --allow-network-for-crypto authorization (a clean re-pull) if preferred over snapshotting the live copy.
7_if_not_pinned_recommendation.authorization: Neither freeze nor fetch is authorized by this memo; each needs a separate explicit instruction. This memo fetches nothing and modifies no data file.

final_line: Crypto-D3a pins the SOURCE provenance of the existing local crypto data (Binance public spot daily klines, USDT, UTC) but the on-disk dataset is a live, gitignored, daily-refreshed copy, not an immutable frozen snapshot -- verdict PROVENANCE_PARTIAL_NOT_READY; a separately authorized factory-internal freeze (no fetch) is the next step, and no crypto strategy is specified, validated, paper-ready, live-ready, or authorized for execution.
trading_recommendation: NONE. Provenance pin only. Source provenance is pinned (Binance spot, USDT, daily-native, UTC) but the dataset is not yet a frozen immutable snapshot, so verdict PROVENANCE_PARTIAL_NOT_READY. No crypto strategy is validated, paper-ready, or live-ready; perps remain blocked; crypto stays a separate research lane; S30 and the futures branches are untouched and S30 remains PARKED after IS_FAIL.
